title: Phone collection before manager handoff
problem: Some requests reach manager handoff before the phone field is collected.
hypothesis: The bot asks for the phone too late or does not make it a hard requirement before manager transfer.
test_a: Current flow: ask service and car, then softly ask phone before handoff.
test_b: Block handoff_ready until phone is collected; explain why the manager needs it.
success_metric: handoff completeness rate; missing phone before handoff count

title: Fallback recovery with quick choices
problem: Open-ended fallback keeps a few clients stuck when the bot fails to classify intent.
hypothesis: Quick intent buttons after the second fallback will recover more conversations.
test_b: Fallback with quick choices: service / price / booking / cancel / manager.

title: Request boundary after handoff
problem: After handoff, a small number of new messages continue the old request state.
hypothesis: Closing active_request after handoff and opening a new request for new service intent will reduce state mixing.
test_b: Close active_request after handoff and route new service intent into a new request.

title: Safe cancellation and reschedule flow
problem: A few cancel/reschedule messages are handled too aggressively by the bot.
hypothesis: Dedicated cancel/reschedule scenario with booking reference and manager handoff prevents false completion claims.
test_b: Dedicated cancel_or_reschedule scenario with booking reference + manager handoff.
success_metric: cancel_flow_wrong count; complete cancel/reschedule handoff rate
